notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 DOES supply measured coil voltages (units V from zarr attrs) on channels p1/p2/p4/p5 — these are the primary evolutive drive. FreeGSNKE structural machine is MAST-U-like (extra divertor circuits D1–D7/Dp with no classic-MAST FAIR-MAST voltage or current). P6 has mapped FAIR-MAST currents (P6L+P6U via coil_map) but no voltage channel → combine=from_current_ohmic builds V=sign*scale*I*R using FreeGSNKE machine coil_resist after load (same source as nl_solver). Divertors use declared default_V=0 (zero-drive), not invented voltages.

Solenoid.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage: p1 (zarr attrs link AMC_SOL to /xdc/pf/f/p1); units V.

PX.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage channel p2 → FreeGSNKE MAST-U-like circuit PX (active_coils.pickle has no P2 label). Explicit cross-machine declaration.

D1.notes: MAST-U-only divertor circuit: neither FAIR-MAST voltage nor classic-MAST current mapping; declared zero-drive (machine_circuits_without_fairmast_drive).

D2.notes: MAST-U-only divertor circuit: neither FAIR-MAST voltage nor classic-MAST current mapping; declared zero-drive (machine_circuits_without_fairmast_drive).

D3.notes: MAST-U-only divertor circuit: neither FAIR-MAST voltage nor classic-MAST current mapping; declared zero-drive (machine_circuits_without_fairmast_drive).

Dp.notes: MAST-U-only divertor circuit: neither FAIR-MAST voltage nor classic-MAST current mapping; declared zero-drive (machine_circuits_without_fairmast_drive).

D5.notes: MAST-U-only divertor circuit: neither FAIR-MAST voltage nor classic-MAST current mapping; declared zero-drive (machine_circuits_without_fairmast_drive).

D6.notes: MAST-U-only divertor circuit: neither FAIR-MAST voltage nor classic-MAST current mapping; declared zero-drive (machine_circuits_without_fairmast_drive).

D7.notes: MAST-U-only divertor circuit: neither FAIR-MAST voltage nor classic-MAST current mapping; declared zero-drive (machine_circuits_without_fairmast_drive).

P4.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage: p4 → FreeGSNKE P4; units V.

P5.notes: PRIMARY measured FAIR-MAST voltage: p5 → FreeGSNKE P5; units V.

P6.notes: No FAIR-MAST voltage channel for P6; FAIR-MAST currents P6L+P6U are mapped via coil_map to circuit P6. V(t)=sign*scale*I_P6(t)*R_P6 using FreeGSNKE coil_resist after load (Ohm's law with machine R — same source nl_solver uses). R is snapshotted into evolutive provenance; fail-closed if R unavailable.
